Flight Officer '''Esege "Tuke" Tuketu''' was a [[Narvath (species)|Narvath]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet's]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]].

==Biography==
[[File:EsegeTuketu-SWZ.png|thumb|left|270px|Esege Tuketu's K-wing starfighter]]
While serving as a pilot for the [[New Republic]], Esege Tuketu was part of [[Task Force Aster]] in the Fifth Battle Group. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Tuketu piloted a [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter]] with his gunner [[Skids]], and commanded [[Red Flight (K-wings)|Red Flight]] at the [[Battle of Doornik-319]].

Esege Tuketu would be stricken by the loss of his fellow pilot [[Jojo]], and was overcome with grief when he saw Jojo's name posted on the list of casualties aboard their carrier ship.<ref name="SOL">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>

During the [[Battle of ILC-905]] Esege Tuketu and Skids were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in action when they sacrificed their lives to destroy a [[Yevetha]]n [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]].
